facebook.caption:
7,599 reviews. 4.8 stars. At a seafood spot on 1 Đường Bạch Đằng.

Hải sản Động Tôm Hùm is not a secret. It's just that good. Fresh lobster, crab, and shellfish at $15-30 a head. That price range on Phu Quoc for seafood this rated is genuinely rare.

The review count alone should tell you everything. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
